pr_title: Add order payload validation before fulfillment
pr_description: Adds validate_order() to reject incomplete orders before they reach the fulfillment queue.
injected_issue: validate_order() nests six levels of if/else ('arrow code') instead of using early-return guard clauses, making the function hard to follow and easy to break when adding another required field.
why_tests_dont_catch_it: The three tests only check the returned error message for a handful of scenarios; the nested structure produces correct output for all of them, so the readability problem never manifests as a failing assertion.
